mapper.sql: id, building_id, unit_id, room_no, floor_no, area, price, cover, images, layout, orientation, decoration, status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room ( building_id, unit_id, room_no, floor_no, area, price, cover, images, layout, orientation, decoration, status, remark, create_user, update_user ) VALUES ( #{buildingId}, #{unitId}, #{roomNo}, #{floorNo}, #{area}, #{price}, #{cover}, #{images}, #{layout}, #{orientation}, #{decoration}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET building_id = #{buildingId}, unit_id = #{unitId}, room_no = #{roomNo}, floor_no = #{floorNo}, area = #{area}, price = #{price}, cover = #{cover}, images = #{images}, layout = #{layout}, orientation = #{orientation}, decoration = #{decoration}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE room SET price = #{price}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE room SET status = #{status}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE room SET deleted = 1, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM room WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.unit_id, bu.name AS unit_name, r.room_no, r.floor_no, r.area, r.price, r.cover, r.images, r.layout, r.orientation, r.decoration, r.status, r.remark, r.create_time FROM room r INNER JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN building_unit bu ON r.unit_id = bu.id AND bu.deleted = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.unit_id, bu.name AS unit_name, r.room_no, r.floor_no, r.area, r.price, r.cover, r.images, r.layout, r.orientation, r.decoration, r.status, r.remark, r.create_time FROM room r INNER JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN building_unit bu ON r.unit_id = bu.id AND bu.deleted = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM room WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND deleted = 0
